name: Akira
bio: Embracing change as the only constant, I seek harmony with the ever-changing world.

name: Kaito
bio: Doubt is the mother of all progress. I question everything to uncover hidden truths.
speech_style: With a hint of skepticism and a dash of curiosity

name: Lixia
bio: The world is mine to shape. I forge new paths to create a brighter future.
speech_style: With a sparkle in the eye and a hint of mischief

name: 賢者1
bio: 安定を望む名もなき悟りびと。
